not crazy expensive either
(832) 555-4190 ask for mike

calling at lunch

honestly not terrible for a plumber

sending now

I'm filling out Ethan and Maya's emergency contact forms for next year. The school needs all current doctors and any medications for both kids. Send me the full list. Include yours too, they want parent medical info on file.
Hi Daniel, just confirming our Thursday call to review your Capital One strategy.
yes! 3pm right? 🙏
3pm works. I'll have some updated numbers for you.
hey lena quick question... is it normal for the minimum payment to barely touch the principal? 😰
At 24.99% APR, yes unfortunately. Most of the $125 goes to interest. We discussed accelerating payments -- even an extra $50/month makes a significant difference.
ok i'll try to find $50 somewhere 🙏🙏
That's the right mindset. Let's review your budget Thursday and find it together.
Daniel, I've updated your paydown projection. At current rate, you're looking at 14 months. With the extra $50, that drops to 11.
11 months feels doable 🙏😊
It is. You're making good progress. The key is consistency.
hey lena random question at 1am sorry 😅 if i have some side income from selling stuff should i be worried about taxes on it

Ha, no worries about the hour. Short answer: yes, self-employment income over $400 is reportable. But there are deductions for materials, supplies, and business expenses that offset the tax burden. We should talk about this.
ok can we add it to our next call? 🙏
Absolutely. Bring any receipts or records you have.
hey lena sorry for the late text 😅 just checking if the 401k contribution is still the right amount
No worries. Yes, 6% is the right amount to maximize your employer match. Don't go lower.
Hi Daniel, year-end tax planning reminder. Do you want to schedule a call before the holidays?
yes please! next week? 🙏
Tuesday at 4pm?
perfect 🙏😊
Good call today. To recap: focus on maximizing your 401k match, keep the Capital One payments consistent, and we'll file your taxes early in Feb.
got it 🙏 thanks lena youre the best
That's what I'm here for. Happy holidays, Daniel.
lena 😰 paypal just sent me a year end summary and its almost $5k from the craft stuff
That's actually good news from an income perspective. We'll handle it with Schedule C deductions. Materials, supplies, booth fees -- they all reduce taxable income significantly.
but is that gonna show up on my regular taxes? like if someone looked at my return? 😰
Your tax return is private. Only you and the IRS see it unless you share it. Why do you ask?
just worried about the child support stuff 😅
Daniel, that's a legal question. I can help you with the tax reporting. For the support implications, you should talk to a family attorney.
yeah youre right 🙏 thanks
Hi Daniel, quick reminder to start gathering your tax documents. W-2 should arrive by end of January.
on it! 🙏 anything specific i should look for?
W-2 from Kessler, 1099 from PayPal, any receipts for business expenses. We'll sort it all out at our appointment.
Tax appointment is Feb 18. Bring your W-2, 1099s, and any receipts from the craft business.
will do! 🙏
Just a reminder -- Capital One payment due the 22nd. Don't miss it.
already scheduled 🙏😊 auto-pay is set
Great news -- I found some additional deductions. Your net taxable from the craft income should be much lower than the gross $5k. Closer to $2,800 after materials and booth fees.
oh thats way better 🙏🙏
That said, it's still income that needs to be reported. Not reporting it creates a much bigger problem than reporting it.
i know i know 😅
sorry for the late text btw 😅
It's reportable income but with deductions it's much more reasonable. And stop apologizing for late texts -- I'm used to it by now.
ok 🙏🙏 ill talk to robert before the tax appointment
Good plan. You've got this.
junho just asked about the card 😰 I think we're ok but can you check if cosigner gets balance alerts from capital one
Co-signers can opt into balance alerts from Capital One. Check his notification settings online or call the number on the back. If he hasn't opted in, he'd only see it on his credit report.
ok 😰🙏 thanks lena
Hey bro how are the kids doing?
great!! ethan is killing it at volleyball and maya is learning to crochet 😊🙏
That's awesome. Crochet huh? Like grandma used to do
exactly!! shes a natural 🧶😊
Hey are you hosting Thanksgiving or is Soo-Jin taking the kids?
i have them! soojin takes them wed evening thru sat. come down bro!! 🙏😊
I'll drive down Thursday morning. 3 hour drive no big deal
YESSS 🔥🙏 the kids will be so excited!!
Hey how's the credit thing going?
making progress bro! paying it down steadily 📈🙏
Good to hear. Proud of you little bro
thanks junho 🙏😊 means a lot
Happy new year bro! How's everything?
happy new year!! everything is good. kids are great 🙏😊 new year new vibes 🔥
Love that energy. Come visit Dallas sometime, I'll take the kids to the aquarium
Same. Got Ethan a little something too
bro you didnt have to!! 🙏
Happy birthday to my nephew! 15 is a big one 🎂
hes already asking when he can open presents lol 😂🎂
Hey how's the credit thing going? 💪
getting there bro! making real progress 🙏📈💪
That's what I like to hear. Love you bro
love you too bro 🙏😊
Hey bro -- got an email from Capital One about the account, something about the statement being ready. Haven't opened it yet. Everything still on track?
Hey Daniel, bowling league registration is open. You and Trevor in?
absolutely!! 🎳🔥 same team as last year?
Yep same lineup. I'll register us. First night is Oct 23.
Hey man u still got that extra bowling ball? Mine cracked
yeah its in my garage! ill bring it thursday 🎳🙏
hey patty! just following up on the PTA bake sale signup. i can bring cookies and banana bread 🙏🍪
Perfect! We need you there by 9am Saturday. Gym entrance.
Oh and bring extras if you can -- last time they sold out fast!
hey rob do you still have that contact for the handyman? my kitchen faucet is leaking 😅
Yeah let me find it. My buddy Mike at Reliable Plumbing
(832) 555-4190. Tell him Rob sent you, he'll give you a good rate
Daniel are you coming to the neighborhood watch meeting Tuesday?
cant make it this time chris! got the kids that night 🙏
Reminder: Parking lot will be repaved this Saturday. Please move vehicles by 7am.
thanks for the heads up 🙏
Water will be shut off 9am-2pm Monday for pipe maintenance.
any idea if it could go longer? 😅
Should be done by 2 but worst case 4pm.
ok thanks 🙏
HOA meeting is Feb 8. Conference room at 6pm. Agenda attached.
Please RSVP by Friday.
Team - CNC line changeover is scheduled for Monday. Daniel can you review the process docs?
on it 🙏 ill have comments by EOD friday
Perfect. Cynthia wants the throughput numbers by Wednesday.
got it. ill pull the SAP reports this afternoon
Thanks Daniel. CC me when you send to Cynthia.
Hi parents! Volleyball team pics are Oct 11. $15 per package.
thanks sarah! ill send the money with ethan 🙏😊
Great! Also need volunteers for the snack bar at Saturday's tournament.
i can do the morning shift! 🙏
You're a lifesaver Daniel. 8am-noon work?
perfect 🙏😊 see you there!
Holiday party is Dec 18! We need parent volunteers for crafts and snacks.
i can bring cookies! homemade chocolate chip 🍪😊
Amazing! Can you bring enough for 25 kids?
no problem! ill make a double batch 🙏🍪
also maya wants to help with the craft station if thats ok 😊
Saturday ride is on! Meeting at Buffalo Bayou trailhead, 7am.
im in!! 🚴🔥 what route we doing?
Heights loop, ~18 miles. Stopping at Catalina Coffee after.
Bring water, it's supposed to be warm.
Reminder: Maya Park has an appointment on Feb 5 at 3:30pm with Dr. Nguyen.
thanks! we'll be there 🙏
Please arrive 10 minutes early. Co-pay of $175 due at time of visit.
Your prescription is ready for pickup at CVS Pharmacy #7621, 5225 Bingle Rd, Houston, TX 77092. Rx: Sertraline 100mg. Copay: $15.00.
Reply STOP to unsubscribe from prescription alerts.
Your Amazon order has shipped! Meta Quest 3 128GB - Estimated delivery: Jan 25. Track your package: amzn.to/3xR92kf
Your Xfinity bill of $89.99 is due Jan 25. Pay at xfinity.com/pay.
can i get an extension? 🙏
We can extend your due date to Feb 1. Reply YES to confirm.
Your payment extension has been confirmed. New due date: Feb 1, 2026. Thank you for being an Xfinity customer.
T-Mobile: Your bill of $140.00 is ready. Due Dec 12. View at t-mobile.com/account.
Your State Farm auto insurance payment of $165.00 has been processed. Policy #TX-4891237.

Hi Daniel, this is Amy from Reliable Plumbing following up on your service call. Everything working okay with the new valve?
Hey Daniel, it's Mike from bowling. You left your wrist guard at the alley last Thursday.
I'll bring it next week. No rush.

thanks coach diana! ill get it submitted tonight 🙏⚽
Great! We're excited to have Maya back. Practices start March 24.
Hi, is this Daniel? I found your number on the Heights Makers Market vendor list. Do you still have the cable knit scarves available?
hi! yes i do 😊 check out my etsy shop HandmadeByDP for the full selection 🧶
Thanks! I'll take a look. My sister loved the dusty rose one she got at the market.
Westbriar MS: Parent-teacher conferences are Nov 3-4. Sign up for your time slot at westbriar-ms.edu/conferences.
Reminder: Daniel Park has an appointment with Dr. Rajesh Patel on Feb 20 at 10:00 AM. Memorial Hermann Medical Group, 1140 Bingle Rd.
confirmed 🙏
Hi Daniel! Dr. Yoon wanted me to let you know your next appointment is Dec 18 at 2pm. Same location.

Great. See you then!
